aboutUs.heading: About Us
aboutUs.paragraph1: Riyadh Scrap Pickup is a premier scrap purchasing and recycling company operating across all neighborhoods of Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. With over a decade of experience, we have established ourselves as the most trusted partner for residential, commercial, and industrial scrap sellers.
aboutUs.paragraph2: We specialize in buying old air conditioners, copper cables, aluminum fixtures, brass machinery, old computers, and demolition scrap. Our mission is to promote eco-friendly metal recycling while offering our clients competitive market prices and seamless, professional collection services.

Our crew can disconnect and dismantle units, remove brackets and outdoor condensers, carry heavy equipment from rooftops or service rooms, load trucks, and leave the area tidy. overview.heading: Riyadh's Trusted Buyer for High-Value Copper Scrap
paragraphs: Copper is one of the most valuable recyclable metals, and small differences in grading can change the final payout. We buy copper scrap in Riyadh from electricians, plumbers, factories, contractors, maintenance teams, demolition sites, workshops, warehouses, and households with honest inspection and clear weight-based pricing.

We accept bright copper wire, stripped copper, insulated copper cable, copper pipes, plumbing offcuts, busbars, copper plates, radiator copper, transformer windings, motor windings, condenser coils, mixed copper, and burnt copper. Clean, sorted copper usually receives a higher rate, but we also purchase mixed and insulated material after fair grading.

Our process is simple: send photos, share the approximate quantity, receive a preliminary estimate, then let our team visit your site for weighing and final quotation. We bring suitable scales for bulk material, separate grades when needed, and pay immediately once the copper scrap is loaded.

meta.title: Understanding Scrap Copper Prices in Riyadh (2026)
meta.description: Discover how scrap copper is graded, what factors drive its price in Riyadh, and tips to maximize your cash payout when selling copper cables.

sections.content: Copper is often referred to as the king of scrap metals due to its excellent electrical conductivity, infinite recyclability, and high market value. In Riyadh, the demand for recycled copper remains strong, driven by construction developments, grid upgrades, and global recycling demands.
To get the best price for your scrap copper, it is essential to understand the grades scrap buyers look for:

items: **Millberry / Bright Bare Copper:** The highest-grade copper. It consists of clean, unalloyed, uncoated, and bare copper wire thicker than 1.6mm. It must be free of insulation and paint.
**Copper No. 1:** Clean copper pipes, tubing, and heavy busbars. Minimal oxidation and no solder joints are permitted.
**Copper No. 2:** Copper wire or pipes that have paint, solder, tin coating, or slight corrosion. This also includes burnt copper wire.
**Insulated Copper Wire:** Cables that still have their plastic casing. Pricing depends on copper recovery (usually 45% to 80% copper inside).

sections.content: Tip: Stripping the insulation off thick copper power cables before selling can increase your payout by up to 30%, as you avoid processing fee deductions.
What Influences Copper Prices in Riyadh?

Local copper scrap prices are determined by the London Metal Exchange (LME) global index, local supply and demand in the Riyadh industrial areas (like Al Sullay), and exchange rates. Purity and weight are the main factors when our team evaluates your scrap copper on-site.

meta.title: How to Safely Sell Old Air Conditioners for Cash
meta.description: Learn the step-by-step guide to selling old split and central air conditioners in Riyadh, including why professional dismantling is essential.

how-to-safely-sell-old-air-conditioners-.heroTitle: How to Safely Sell [Old Air Conditioners] for Cash
how-to-safely-sell-old-air-conditioners-.author: Riyadh Scrap Pickup Team

sections.content: Riyadh's hot climate means that air conditioning units are vital. However, over time, AC units lose efficiency, break down, or become obsolete. Replacing them leaves you with heavy metal scrap that can be sold for excellent cash returns.
Why Scrap AC Units Are Valuable
Air conditioners are packed with valuable materials. Even if the unit is completely non-functional, it contains:

items: **Copper Tubing & Windings:** Found in the condenser coils and compressor motor.
**Aluminum Fins:** Wrapped around the copper tubes in the radiator grids.
**Heavy Steel Casing:** The outer cabinet is heavy-gauge galvanized steel.

sections.content: Warning: Air conditioning units contain refrigerants (Freon gas). Releasing these gases into the air is illegal and harmful. Always use a licensed scrap buyer who can dismantle and reclaim the gas safely.
Step-by-Step Guide to Selling Your AC Scrap

First, take clear photos of the units (especially labels showing capacity). Second, call or WhatsApp our team for an estimate. Third, schedule a time for our crew to visit. We will safely disconnect the wiring, recover refrigerant, dismantle the heavy units from wall brackets, load them, and pay you cash on the spot.

meta.title: The Benefits of Metal Recycling for Riyadh's Environment
meta.description: Explore how local scrap recycling reduces landfills, saves energy, and aligns with Saudi Vision 2030 circular economy goals in Riyadh.

the-benefits-of-metal-recycling-for-riya.heroTitle: The Benefits of [Metal Recycling] for Riyadh
the-benefits-of-metal-recycling-for-riya.author: Riyadh Scrap Pickup Team

sections.content: As Riyadh grows rapidly, waste management becomes a critical priority. Metal recycling plays a pivotal role in establishing a circular economy, conserving natural resources, and reducing environmental degradation in Saudi Arabia.
Environmental Advantages of Scrap Metal Recycling
Recycling metals like copper, steel, and aluminum has a direct positive impact on our local environment:

items: **Energy Savings:** Recycling aluminum uses 95% less energy than producing it from raw bauxite. Recycling copper saves 85% of the energy needed for mining.
**Landfill Reduction:** Scrap metal is extremely heavy and dense. By recycling old machinery and AC units, we prevent massive amounts of metal from filling up Riyadh's municipal landfills.
**Lower Carbon Footprint:** Manufacturing items from recycled scrap reduces industrial greenhouse gas emissions dramatically.

sections.content: Saudi Vision 2030: Riyadh is targeting a high rate of landfill diversion and circular recycling. By selling your residential or industrial scrap, you directly contribute to these environmental and national goals.

Instead of leaving scrap copper cables, old steel shelves, or broken appliances to rust in your yard, contact a professional buyer. We provide free pickup, sort the metals, and route them to local industrial processing yards where they are melted down and forged into brand new materials.

aboutPage.storyText1: Founded in Riyadh over ten years ago, Riyadh Scrap Pickup has grown from a local metal merchant to Riyadh's most reliable full-service scrap collection and recycling enterprise. We serve residential, commercial, and industrial clients across all neighborhoods of Riyadh.
aboutPage.storyText2: We specialize in purchasing high-value scrap materials, including copper cables, air conditioning units, aluminum frames, brass fixtures, transformers, obsolete machinery, and factory scrap. Our core belief is that metal recycling should be rewarding, clean, and completely stress-free for the seller.

aboutPage.visionText: To lead Riyadh's recycling sector in alignment with Saudi Vision 2030, introducing advanced, environmentally safe scrap processing methods and zero-waste landfill policies.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Riyadh Scrap Pickup
meta.description: Privacy Policy for Riyadh Scrap Pickup. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in Riyadh under Saudi PDPL regulations.

sidebar.title: Document Information
sidebar.fact1: Compliant with Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL).
sidebar.fact2: Data collected solely for scrap evaluations, logistics & anti-theft checks.
sidebar.fact3: We never sell, lease, or rent your personal contact information.
sidebar.fact4: Secure local data storage with advanced cybersecurity protocols.

content.intro: At Riyadh Scrap Pickup, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, process, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, communicate with us, or utilize our scrap purchasing and pickup services in Riyadh.

sections.title: 1. Regulatory Framework & Compliance (Saudi PDPL)
sections.text: Riyadh Scrap Pickup ('we', 'us', or 'our') operates in strict compliance with the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) enacted by Royal Decree No. M/197. We serve as the data controller for the personal information processed during your interactions with our website and our commercial scrap metal collection services in Riyadh and neighboring regions.

sections.title: 2. Personal Data We Collect
sections.text:
To provide accurate scrap evaluations and coordinate heavy logistics, we collect specific categories of personal data:

• Identity & Contact Details: Full name, active mobile number (WhatsApp-enabled), and email address.

• Location Data: Precise geographic coordinates, neighborhood name, and address details in Riyadh to route our collection trucks.

• Scrap Asset Materials: Detailed descriptions, lists, and uploaded photographs of your scrap assets (e.g., air conditioners, copper cables, industrial machinery) to estimate market value.

• Official Verification Data: To comply with local anti-theft laws, we may require a copy of your Saudi National ID or Iqama (Resident Identity card) for transaction invoices.

sections.title: 3. Methods of Information Collection
sections.text:
We gather personal data through direct interactions, including:

• Inquiries submitted via our online contact and scrap valuation forms.

• Direct communication via WhatsApp chat, text messages, or phone calls.

• On-site appraisals and physical weight evaluations conducted by our field representatives.

• Automatically collected technical data, such as IP addresses, browser types, and language preferences, through standard analytics tools.

sections.title: 4. Legal Grounds and Purposes of Processing
sections.text:
We process your personal information under the following legal bases:

• Contract Performance: To provide on-site scrap evaluation, dismantling, transport, and financial settlement.

• Legal Compliance: To verify ownership and register transaction logs with Riyadh municipal authorities and security agencies in compliance with Saudi commercial and anti-theft regulations.

• Legitimate Business Interests: To optimize our fleet routes, perform service quality checks, and enhance website responsiveness.

sections.title: 5. Data Protection and Cybersecurity Safeguards
sections.text: We prioritize the security of your data. We implement robust technical, organizational, and physical security measures designed to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or disclosure. All digital communications are encrypted, and physical copies of transaction records are stored in secure facilities at our Riyadh operations center. Access to your personal data is restricted to authorized personnel who require it to complete your service request.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention and Disposal
sections.text: Your personal data is retained only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy or to comply with statutory retention periods under Saudi commercial and tax laws (typically up to ten years for commercial transaction logs). Upon the expiration of the retention period, or upon a valid deletion request, your personal data will be securely destroyed or permanently anonymized so it can no longer be associated with you.

sections.title: 7. Third-Party Data Disclosures
sections.text:
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to commercial third parties. We may disclose your information under strict confidentiality to:

• Riyadh municipal authorities and the Ministry of Environment, Water, and Agriculture (MEWA) to certify proper disposal of industrial waste or refrigerants.

• Law enforcement or national security authorities, strictly when required by Saudi laws, to verify the legal provenance of metal scrap and prevent theft or illegal scrap trade.

sections.title: 8. Your Rights Under the Saudi PDPL
sections.text:
Under the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law, you hold specific statutory rights regarding your personal data:

• Right to be Informed: The right to know the legal basis and purpose of our data collection.

• Right of Access: The right to request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

• Right to Rectification: The right to update or correct inaccurate or incomplete personal data.

• Right to Destruction: The right to request the deletion of your personal data when no longer needed for processing, subject to local regulatory retention mandates.

sections.title: 9. Changes to This Privacy Policy & Contact Details
sections.text: We reserve the right to update this policy periodically to reflect changes in our operational procedures or Saudi regulatory mandates. For inquiries regarding your privacy rights, or to submit a data request, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@riyadhscrappickup.com or via WhatsApp at +966 55 000 0000.

meta.title: Terms of Service | Riyadh Scrap Pickup
meta.description: Terms and Conditions of service for Riyadh Scrap Pickup. Understand scrap ownership, dismantling, site access, and pickup terms in Riyadh.

sidebar.title: Terms Overview
sidebar.fact1: Sellers must verify scrap ownership with valid Saudi ID/Iqama.
sidebar.fact2: Weights measured on calibrated digital scales at pickup site.
sidebar.fact3: Utility lines (water, gas, electricity) must be disconnected by client.
sidebar.fact4: Spot cash for residents; bank transfer/VAT invoices for corporations.

content.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before utilizing our scrap purchasing, dismantling, and collection services. By requesting a pickup, submitting details, or scheduling an evaluation, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms.

sections.title: 1. Scope of Agreement & Service Offerings
sections.text: These Terms of Service govern your relationship with Riyadh Scrap Pickup regarding our scrap purchasing, dismantling, rigging, and transport services. Our services are available to individual residents, commercial businesses, and industrial enterprises within the municipal boundaries of Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. By requesting a valuation, scheduling a pickup, or engaging our crew, you agree to be bound by these terms in their entirety.

sections.title: 2. Ownership Warranties & Anti-Theft Verification
sections.text: To maintain the integrity of our recycling supply chain and comply with the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, the seller represents and warrants that they are the absolute legal owner of the scrap materials offered for sale, or possess explicit, written, and notarized authorization from the legal owner. Sellers must present a valid Saudi National ID or Iqama (Resident Identity card) for verification. Riyadh Scrap Pickup maintains a zero-tolerance policy for stolen metals. We reserve the absolute right to refuse service and report any suspicious materials or fraudulent ownership claims to the Riyadh Police and security authorities.

sections.title: 3. Weight, Evaluation & Pricing Integrity
sections.text: All price estimates provided via phone, email, or WhatsApp are preliminary projections based on market rates and seller descriptions. The final purchase price is established only after our on-site team performs a physical inspection and weighs the metals using certified, calibrated digital scales. Prices are indexed against daily national and global scrap metal market rates. We guarantee transparent weight measurements. If a price agreement cannot be reached on-site, either party may cancel the transaction without liability before loading commences.

sections.title: 4. Site Access, Logistics & Safety Requirements
sections.text: The seller must provide our transport vehicles and rigging personnel safe, unobstructed access to the premises where the scrap is stored. It is the seller's responsibility to obtain any necessary building permissions, landlord consents, or gated-community clearance prior to our arrival. Our team will perform loading and transport in a professional and safe manner, but the seller must ensure that the access pathway is clear of structural hazards and valuable personal property.

sections.title: 5. Utility Disconnections & Dismantling Liabilities
sections.text: For safety reasons, prior to our crew commencing any dismantling work on scrap assets—including but not limited to split air conditioners, central HVAC units, industrial machinery, backup generators, and electrical panels—the seller MUST ensure that all associated utilities (electricity, water, gas, refrigerant lines) are fully disconnected and capped by certified technicians. Riyadh Scrap Pickup is not liable for structural damage, electrical short circuits, water leaks, gas leaks, or environmental hazards arising from the seller's failure to verify utility disconnection.

sections.title: 6. Payment Structure and Financial Settlements
sections.text: Financial settlements are conducted immediately upon completion of loading and weight verification at the site. For residential accounts, payments are typically completed in cash on the spot, subject to statutory cash transaction limits under Saudi anti-money laundering (AML) regulations. For commercial and industrial accounts, payment is settled via bank transfer to a verified corporate bank account, or as agreed in writing. If applicable under ZATCA regulations, tax-registered commercial sellers must provide a compliant VAT invoice.

sections.title: 7. Environmental Safety and Waste Management Compliance
sections.text: Riyadh Scrap Pickup is dedicated to environmental sustainability. All scrap metals and electronic waste are processed and recycled in compliance with the rules of the Ministry of Environment, Water, and Agriculture (MEWA) and local Riyadh waste management directives. We do not purchase or transport hazardous chemicals, toxic waste, or pressurized cylinders unless certified empty and safe. We recover and dispose of air conditioning refrigerants safely to prevent atmospheric damage.

sections.title: 8. Indemnification & Limitation of Liability
sections.text: The seller agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Riyadh Scrap Pickup, its directors, officers, employees, and subcontractors from any claims, losses, damages, liabilities, and expenses (including legal fees) arising from: (a) breach of ownership warranties, (b) pre-existing structural or environmental contamination at the pickup site, or (c) failure to disconnect utility lines. Our maximum aggregate liability for any operational claim during services shall not exceed the net scrap purchase value of the transaction.

sections.title: 9. Governing Law & Dispute Resolution
sections.text: These Terms of Service, and all transactions arising from them, shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any dispute, controversy, or claim arising out of or in connection with these terms, including their validity or termination, that cannot be resolved amicably, shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
